The Problem

Lean teams are losing the marketing race.

Enterprise competitors have 20-person growth teams. You have an idea, a deadline, and a spreadsheet held together by hope.

Time you don't have

Researching leads, writing emails, creating content — a full cycle eats 22+ hours every single week. That's half your workweek, gone.

Signals you're missing

By the time you spot a market trend or a prospect trigger, the window's closed. Timing is everything in B2B — manual monitoring always lags.

Copy that doesn't convert

Generic outreach gets ignored. Personalisation at scale was a luxury reserved for big teams — until now.

No coherent strategy

Disconnected tools, fragmented data, no single view of what's working. Growth becomes guesswork dressed up as a plan.

The average SME founder spends over a third of their week on tasks a machine could do better.

22h
Manual workflow
→
7min
With MarCoid AI
The Solution

One operating system. Every marketing function.

MarCoid AI acts as your autonomous marketing layer — discovering opportunities, crafting outreach, and publishing content, without waiting on you.

01

Lead Discovery

Surface qualified prospects from across the web, filtered by your exact ICP — in seconds.

02

Trend Detection

Real-time signal scanning across news, social, and market data so you act before the crowd.

03

Opportunity Matching

AI maps each lead to your value props and prioritises the ones most likely to convert.

04

B2B Email Generation

Hyper-personalised cold emails written from live context — funding rounds, job changes, news.

05

LinkedIn Content

Thought leadership posts and carousel scripts — in your voice, calibrated to your audience.

06

Visual Creation

On-brand creative assets generated alongside your campaigns — no designer briefings required.

Explore the platform
How it works

Three steps. One cup of coffee.

No complex setup. No 40-hour onboarding. Just connect, configure, and let MarCoid run.

1

Tell MarCoid who you're after

Define your ideal customer profile in plain language — industry, company size, role, pain point. That's it. No code, no filters to configure, no spreadsheets.

⚡ 60 seconds to set up
2

MarCoid discovers, detects & matches

The engine scans leads, monitors market signals, and ranks opportunities by conversion likelihood — all before you've refilled your cup. Fully autonomous, fully contextual.

⚡ Fully automated
3

Review, approve & launch

Personalised emails, LinkedIn posts, and visuals land in your dashboard, ready to go. You stay in control — MarCoid does the heavy lifting every single time.

⚡ You're live in minutes

Common Questions

Straight answers.

Who is MarCoid AI built for?

+
MarCoid is designed specifically for SMEs, startups, and lean growth teams — anyone who needs enterprise-grade marketing output without enterprise-grade headcount or budget. If you have more ambition than bandwidth, it's built for you.

How is this different from existing AI writing tools?

+
Most AI tools make you do all the thinking and just speed up the typing. MarCoid is a full marketing operating system — it discovers leads, detects market signals, prioritises opportunities, and generates contextual output across email, LinkedIn, and visuals. It's not a writing assistant. It's an autonomous system.

How does the 7-minute workflow actually work?

+
You set your ICP once. MarCoid handles discovery, scoring, matching, and content generation autonomously in the background. When you open the dashboard, your pipeline is ready: qualified leads, personalised messages, published content. Your active decision time is under 7 minutes.

Is early access free?

+
Yes. During our beta period, early access is completely free. Waitlist members will also receive priority onboarding, locked-in launch pricing, and direct access to the founding team.

Does it integrate with my existing tools?

+
MarCoid integrates natively with HubSpot, LinkedIn, Gmail, and Slack at launch, with more on the roadmap. If you have a specific integration need, our team wants to hear about it — early users directly shape what we build next.

How does it personalise outreach at scale?

+
MarCoid pulls live context for each prospect — recent funding rounds, new hires, product launches, news mentions — and uses that to generate emails that feel hand-written, not templated. Every message is grounded in what's actually happening at that company, right now.
